title: Hymenocallis viridiflora
taxonomy: Hymenocallis viridiflora is classified in the kingdom Plantae, belonging to the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant is further categorized under the genus Hymenocallis. It is a species of flowering plant native to North America. The classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf and flower morphology, as well as its geographical distribution. This classification helps in identifying and differentiating Hymenocallis viridiflora from other related species.
